notes: Create, list, edit, delete, and clone agents via ship agents subcommands
Agent definitions in JSONC with identity, skills refs, MCP servers, permissions, rules, and provider_settings
AgentProfile TOML compiled into provider-native subagent files for Claude, Gemini, Cursor, and Codex
Agents can target specific providers or all providers when the providers list is empty
Per-agent permission overrides with preset reference, tools_allow, tools_deny, and tools_ask lists
Per-agent model override compiled to each provider's model field
Per-provider settings passthrough (claude, codex, gemini, cursor, opencode) with Ship-managed key exclusions
Inline rules appended to context file after .ship/rules/*.md files
Plugin installation intent with project or user scope, emitted as manifest for CLI execution
JSON Schema at schemas/agent.schema.json with upstream provider schema refs for editor autocompletion
Hidden ship agents log command appends timestamped entries to .ship/agent.log
